stemHtml:
The take-off distance of an aircraft is 600 m in a standard atmosphere, no wind at 0 ft pressure-altitude. Using the following corrections:

± 20 m / 1000 ft field elevation
- 5 m / kts headwind
+10 m / kts tailwind
±15 m / % runway slope
± 5 m / °C deviation from standard temperature.

The take-off distance from an airport at 1000 ft elevation, temperature 17°C, QNH 1013,25 hPa, 1% up-slope, 10 kts tailwind is:
